assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends using the Stable release channel with configuration example and explains it provides updates 2-3 months after Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response includes maintenance exclusion configuration with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' and shows command to add exclusions with '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope=no-upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures a 4-hour maintenance window on Sunday 2-6 AM UTC with weekly recurrence, demonstrating a narrow weekend-only window

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response implements multi-tier node pool strategy with separate 'training-pool' for H100 GPUs and 'system-pool' for system components, plus node taints to prevent mixing workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response sets 'autoUpgrade: false' for training node pool with comment 'Manual control for training nodes' and includes procedures for checking pending upgrades before training

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes training job checkpointing configuration with 5-minute intervals, GCS checkpoint path, and preStop lifecycle hooks for graceful shutdown

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver version testing or validation in staging environments before production upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect, RDMA networking requirements, or their version compatibility considerations
